title: Deja Vu | EnderVerse
description: The result of 1 year of vanilla modding
body:
After more than a year, The 200 Vanilla+ modpack is out.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pelOqXjJyjs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Please manually install these mods as I'm not allowed to include them here:
[Farmer's structures](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-structures)
[decorative storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/decostorage)


This modpack is the result of a five-episode Vanilla+ series, here you go: 
[Full playlist of the journey](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6dx2t_lD1gw&list=PLigK-r2gFjWA92X_Svd_ujT8CmsNGKC1U&index=1&t=0s)

This modpack features a little bit of everything, handpicked by me, there are countless structures, special boss fight mechanics along with new bosses, an intuitive daily quest system *having to hunt monsters*, a lot of animals to study, fun artistic mechanics like chalk, and more!

Currently, three versions are available:
Fabric 1.20.1 (the sweet spot)
Fabric 1.21.1 (lacks content, but is highly stable and optimized)
Neoforge 1.20.1 (highest in content, optimization isn't the best though)
